description: About BostonGene Since our inception in Boston in 2015, we've led the charge in oncology personal healthcare, offering an extensive array of diagnostic tools that empower clinical decisions and advance patient care. Our culture is our foundation—fueled by innovation, a commitment to transformation, and a team of authentic, driven individuals worldwide. At BostonGene, you'll find a community that's not just about the work but about making a difference, together. Join us to be a part of a future where your work contributes to transformative cancer treatments and shapes the lives of patients globally. We develop a distributed information and analytical system that provides oncologists with the necessary data for diagnosis and personalized treatment of patients. Position Summary We are seeking a Generative AI Engineer to specialize in biological data, including RNA-seq, Digital Pathology (Multiplexed Immunofluorescence, Hematoxylin, and Eosin staining) and other types of biological data. In this role, you will develop and implement single-modality encoders (e.g., VAE, LIAE, DINOv2) and multimodal deep learning models (e.g., Stable Diffusion based and/or DDPM) using this data. The position also involves interpreting complex biological data and ensuring adherence to Good Clinical Practice (GCP) and Good Laboratory Practice (GCLP) standards.
responsibilities: Analyze and interpret single-modality data, including, but not limited to RNAseq, histology, cfRNA, and xCR. Develop and implement Python-based computer vision algorithms for image analysis, encompassing data preprocessing, image segmentation, feature extraction, and classification. Maintain detailed records of all analyses to ensure data integrity and reproducibility. Stay updated with the latest advancements in computer vision, imaging, and deep learning technologies. Ensure all activities comply with GCP and GCLP standards. Integrate with LLM API for process automation and support. Support and develop multimodal diffusion-based models.
required_qualifications: Bachelor’s, preferably Master’s or PhD degree in Computer Science, Bioinformatics, Biomedical Engineering, or a related field. At least 2 years of experience in computer vision or a related field. Demonstrated experience with Python-based image analysis and computer vision algorithms. Strong analytical and problem-solving skills. Good communication skills, both written and verbal. Ability to work collaboratively in a multidisciplinary team. Attention to detail and a commitment to producing high-quality work. Required Technical Skills Proficiency in Python programming language. Strong understanding of computer vision concepts, including image processing, segmentation, and feature extraction. OR Demonstrated experience processing xCR data. OR Experience processing RNA sequencing data. Experience with libraries such as OpenCV, scikit-image, and PyTorch. (PyTorch is a main framework used by division). Familiarity with image analysis techniques used in biological and medical research. Knowledge of machine learning algorithms and their application to data. Ability to handle large datasets and perform statistical analysis. Proficiency in using data visualization tools such as Matplotlib, Seaborn, or similar. Understanding of LLM principles of work and experience in LLM integration with API OR Understanding of stable diffusion principles of work. Experience with multimodal models.
additional_information: Why Join Us? Join our team at BostonGene, where your work makes a real difference! As a pioneering biotech company with a global footprint, we're passionate about improving lives through groundbreaking oncology personal healthcare. With a team of over 500 dedicated professionals, we foster an empowering environment where your unique skills contribute to a healthier, better world. At BostonGene, you're not just choosing a career; you're stepping into a role that leverages your talents to create a positive change. Discover a workplace that values you as its most precious asset, offering a competitive benefits package designed to enhance your life and those around you. We offer: Full-time position with a permanent contract and flexible working hours, with hybrid work options. Competitive salary and comprehensive healthcare insurance. Convenient office location in Yerevan (1-minute walk from the metro) with on-site snacks. Relocation package for candidates and their immediate family members, including full documentation and bureaucracy support (bank accounts, residence permits, school contacts, etc.). Corporate benefits, including English language lessons and gym membership. Dynamic and versatile professional environment with a diverse team of bioinformaticians, biologists, physicians, and software developers committed to improving oncological healthcare. Careful, structured, and responsible supervision to support professional growth.
skills_tags: Ability to work independently, Entrepreneurial thinking, Analytical skills, Python, Computer vision, OpenCV

description: Մեր թիմը համալրվում է, փնտրում ենք միջին մակարդակի React Native ծրագրավորող, ով կմիանա մեր թիմին և կօգնի ստեղծել ժամանակակից, բարձր արդյունավետությամբ մոբայլ հավելվածներ։
responsibilities: Մասնակցել բջջային հավելվածների (iOS և Android) նախագծմանը և մշակմանը՝ օգտագործելով React Native տեխնոլոգիան։ Իրականացնել մաքուր, արդյունավետ և վերաօգտագործելի կոդ՝ ապահովելով հավելվածների բարձր արտադրողականություն։ Ինտեգրել frontend-ը backend API-ների հետ (RESTful / GraphQL)։ Իրականացնել UI/UX դիզայնների ճշգրիտ իրականացում՝ ապահովելով հարթ և ինտուիտիվ օգտագործողի փորձ։ Փորձարկել և շտկել հավելվածներում առաջացած սխալները (debugging, testing)։ Օպտիմալացնել հավելվածների արագագործությունը և հիշողության օգտագործումը։ Համագործակցել backend ծրագրավորողների, դիզայներների և QA մասնագետների հետ՝ ապահովելու բարձրորակ վերջնական արդյունք։ Մասնակցել բջջային հավելվածների (iOS և Android) նախագծմանը և մշակմանը՝ օգտագործելով React Native տեխնոլոգիան։ Իրականացնել մաքուր, արդյունավետ և վերաօգտագործելի կոդ՝ ապահովելով հավելվածների բարձր արտադրողականություն։ Ինտեգրել frontend-ը backend API-ների հետ (RESTful / GraphQL)։ Իրականացնել UI/UX դիզայնների ճշգրիտ իրականացում՝ ապահովելով հարթ և ինտուիտիվ օգտագործողի փորձ։ Փորձարկել և շտկել հավելվածներում առաջացած սխալները (debugging, testing)։ Օպտիմալացնել հավելվածների արագագործությունը և հիշողության օգտագործումը։ Համագործակցել backend ծրագրավորողների, դիզայներների և QA մասնագետների հետ՝ ապահովելու բարձրորակ վերջնական արդյունք։
required_qualifications: React Native տեխնոլոգիայի խորացված իմացություն։ JavaScript և TypeScript լեզուների վստահ իմացություն։ Մոբայլ հավելվածների կառուցվածքի, նավիգացիայի (React Navigation) և state management-ի (Redux, Zustand, MobX) հմտություններ։ Routing գրադարանների փորձ (React Router)։ API-ների (RESTful, GraphQL) հետ ինտեգրման հմտություններ։ UI գրադարանների իմացություն (օր.՝ Material UI, Ant Design, Tailwind CSS)։ Կոդի կառուցվածքային կազմակերպման և վերաօգտագործման սկզբունքների իմացություն։ Version control համակարգերի (Git) հետ աշխատանքի փորձ։ Responsive design և cross-browser compatibility հմտություններ։ Լավ հաղորդակցման հմտություններ և թիմային աշխատանքի փորձ։ Անգլերեն լեզվի բավարար մակարդակ՝ տեխնիկական նյութերի ընթերցման համար։
additional_information: Աշխատանքային ժամերը՝ 09։30-18։30։
skills_tags: Teamwork, Open-Mindedness, Software development, React Native

Մեր թիմը համալրվում է, փնտրում ենք միջին մակարդակի React Native ծրագրավորող, ով կմիանա մեր թիմին և կօգնի ստեղծել ժամանակակից, բարձր արդյունավետությամբ մոբայլ հավելվածներ։

Մասնակցել բջջային հավելվածների (iOS և Android) նախագծմանը և մշակմանը՝ օգտագործելով React Native տեխնոլոգիան։ Իրականացնել մաքուր, արդյունավետ և վերաօգտագործելի կոդ՝ ապահովելով հավելվածների բարձր արտադրողականություն։ Ինտեգրել frontend-ը backend API-ների հետ (RESTful / GraphQL)։ Իրականացնել UI/UX դիզայնների ճշգրիտ իրականացում՝ ապահովելով հարթ և ինտուիտիվ օգտագործողի փորձ։ Փորձարկել և շտկել հավելվածներում առաջացած սխալները (debugging, testing)։ Օպտիմալացնել հավելվածների արագագործությունը և հիշողության օգտագործումը։ Համագործակցել backend ծրագրավորողների, դիզայներների և QA մասնագետների հետ՝ ապահովելու բարձրորակ վերջնական արդյունք։ Մասնակցել բջջային հավելվածների (iOS և Android) նախագծմանը և մշակմանը՝ օգտագործելով React Native տեխնոլոգիան։ Իրականացնել մաքուր, արդյունավետ և վերաօգտագործելի կոդ՝ ապահովելով հավելվածների բարձր արտադրողականություն։ Ինտեգրել frontend-ը backend API-ների հետ (RESTful / GraphQL)։ Իրականացնել UI/UX դիզայնների ճշգրիտ իրականացում՝ ապահովելով հարթ և ինտուիտիվ օգտագործողի փորձ։ Փորձարկել և շտկել հավելվածներում առաջացած սխալները (debugging, testing)։ Օպտիմալացնել հավելվածների արագագործությունը և հիշողության օգտագործումը։ Համագործակցել backend ծրագրավորողների, դիզայներների և QA մասնագետների հետ՝ ապահովելու բարձրորակ վերջնական արդյունք։

React Native տեխնոլոգիայի խորացված իմացություն։ JavaScript և TypeScript լեզուների վստահ իմացություն։ Մոբայլ հավելվածների կառուցվածքի, նավիգացիայի (React Navigation) և state management-ի (Redux, Zustand, MobX) հմտություններ։ Routing գրադարանների փորձ (React Router)։ API-ների (RESTful, GraphQL) հետ ինտեգրման հմտություններ։ UI գրադարանների իմացություն (օր.՝ Material UI, Ant Design, Tailwind CSS)։ Կոդի կառուցվածքային կազմակերպման և վերաօգտագործման սկզբունքների իմացություն։ Version control համակարգերի (Git) հետ աշխատանքի փորձ։ Responsive design և cross-browser compatibility հմտություններ։ Լավ հաղորդակցման հմտություններ և թիմային աշխատանքի փորձ։ Անգլերեն լեզվի բավարար մակարդակ՝ տեխնիկական նյութերի ընթերցման համար։

description: The Management Reporting & Financial Analysis team is expanding to enhance the organization's data-driven decision-making capabilities. This role centers on the architecture of robust finance semantic models and the design of high-impact executive dashboards. The position offers an opportunity to bridge technical data engineering with financial storytelling, ensuring accuracy, performance, and usability in monthly reporting cycles.
responsibilities: Semantic model architecture : Design and maintenance of scalable Power BI datasets using best-practice dimensional modeling (Star Schema) to support self-service analytics. Advanced DAX development : Creation of optimized DAX measures to handle complex financial logic, including variance analysis, time intelligence, cohort analysis, currency conversion, etc. Report user experience (UX) : implementation of advanced navigation features such as drill-throughs, custom tooltips, bookmarks, and field parameters to create intuitive user journeys. Performance optimization : Oversight of model performance, including aggregation strategies and reduce render times for high-volume reports. Governance & security : Design and management of enterprise-grade security models, including dynamic Row-Level Security (RLS) for sensitive financial data.
required_qualifications: Deep understanding of evaluation contexts, context transition, and calculation groups. Ability to write performant code for large datasets. 3+ years of experience in modeling financial statements (P&L, Balance Sheet, Cash Flow) and handling complexities like parent-child hierarchies and multi-entity consolidations. Strong command of Power Query (M Language) for data transformation and cleaning. Track record demonstrating the ability to translate abstract business questions into clear, actionable visualizations.
skills_tags: Data Management, Communication, Power BI

company_name: Protelion Research and Development Center LLC
description: At Protelion Research and Development Center, a leading cybersecurity company specializing in data protection products and solutions, we are looking for Deployment Engineer to join our team. In this role, you will work closely with engineers, product teams, and customers to support the deployment and integration of our cybersecurity solutions in real-world infrastructures. You will analyze customer environments, participate in technical discussions and demonstrations, and contribute to the successful implementation of our products. This role requires a strong interest in networking, infrastructure, and cybersecurity technologies, as well as the ability to communicate technical concepts clearly. This is a full-time, on-site role based in Yerevan, Armenia, for a employees who are legally authorized to work in Armenia.
responsibilities: • Participate in the deployment and integration of company cybersecurity products in customer environments. • Analyze customer infrastructure and technical requirements to support successful solution implementation. • Participate in product demonstrations, technical presentations, and discussions with customers and partners. • Prepare and maintain technical documentation, deployment guides, and customer-facing materials. • Support troubleshooting and analysis of networking and system-related issues during deployment activities. • Collaborate with product, development, and support teams to ensure stable and effective product implementation. • Collect and analyze customer feedback and share insights with internal teams to improve products and solutions.
required_qualifications: • Solid understanding of networking fundamentals including TCP/IP, routing, switching, DNS, DHCP, and NAT. • Understanding of common network protocols such as HTTP/HTTPS, TCP, UDP, ICMP, SSH, and VPN technologies. • Experience working with Linux and Windows systems in technical or administrative tasks. • Experience working with Virutalization (ESXI ) • Understanding of cybersecurity principles, modern threats, and protection mechanisms . • Ability to analyze technical environments and troubleshoot networking or infrastructure issues. • Strong communication skills and the ability to explain technical concepts clearly to both technical and non-technical audiences. • Ability to work with technical documentation and learn new tools and technologies efficiently. • VoIP system (as a plus) Languages • Russian — at least B2 • English — at least B2
additional_information: This role might require participations in Business trips. To apply please follow the link: https: //job-boards.eu.greenhouse.io/protelion/jobs/4813251101
skills_tags: Ability to work independently, Personal branding, Negotiation  skills, Written communication skills, Customer/service oriented, Logical thinking, HTTP, Virtualization, Place and Route, TCP/IP, VoIP, DNS, SSH, VPN, TCP and UDP Communication Protocols

• Solid understanding of networking fundamentals including TCP/IP, routing, switching, DNS, DHCP, and NAT. • Understanding of common network protocols such as HTTP/HTTPS, TCP, UDP, ICMP, SSH, and VPN technologies. • Experience working with Linux and Windows systems in technical or administrative tasks. • Experience working with Virutalization (ESXI ) • Understanding of cybersecurity principles, modern threats, and protection mechanisms . • Ability to analyze technical environments and troubleshoot networking or infrastructure issues. • Strong communication skills and the ability to explain technical concepts clearly to both technical and non-technical audiences. • Ability to work with technical documentation and learn new tools and technologies efficiently. • VoIP system (as a plus) Languages • Russian — at least B2 • English — at least B2

description: We are a startup with a clear goal and a plan to achieve it. We are just starting out and looking for our first developers to help us build something amazing. If you're excited to be part of a big project from the beginning, we'd love for you to apply!
responsibilities: Platform Architecture & Design: Implement and contribute to the design of a scalable, high-performance platform using Node.js. Ensure that the platform is modular and supports easy integration with third-party systems and APIs. Assist in the system architecture, including integration, data mapping, data storage, and client-facing processing. Integration Management: Implement integrations with various external systems, ensuring seamless data exchange. Contribute to defining and implementing data mapping strategies to transform and standardize data from different sources. Support the establishment of protocols for error handling, data validation, and retry mechanisms for integrations. Database Design & Management: Assist in designing and managing the database schema to support high-volume, real-time data storage. Optimize database performance for quick data retrieval and efficient storage. Implement data archiving and backup strategies to ensure data integrity and availability. Data Processing & Client Delivery: Develop and maintain efficient data processing pipelines to handle large volumes of data. Ensure accurate and timely delivery of processed data to clients through various channels. Implement monitoring and logging mechanisms to track data flow and processing accuracy. Quality Assurance & Documentation: Ensure all code is thoroughly tested and meets the highest standards of quality. Maintain comprehensive documentation of the system architecture, data flows, and integration processes. Contribute to efforts to automate testing and deployment processes. Continuous Improvement & Innovation: Stay up-to-date with the latest trends and best practices in software development, Node.js, and system integrations. Identify opportunities for improvement in the platform and suggest new features and optimizations. Encourage innovation within the team and foster a forward-thinking approach to development.
required_qualifications: Experience: 3+ years of professional experience in software development with a strong focus on Node.js. Experience in implementing complex platforms with multiple integrations. Familiarity with designing and managing databases, with a focus on performance optimization. Experience in odds feed or betting fields is a plus. Technical Skills: Proficiency in Node.js, with a solid understanding of its ecosystem and best practices. Knowledge of integration patterns, API design, and data mapping techniques. Familiarity with relational and NoSQL databases, including schema design, indexing, and query optimization. Experience with cloud platforms (e.g., AWS, GCP) and containerization (e.g., Docker, Kubernetes). Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines, automated testing frameworks, and version control systems (e.g., Git). Soft Skills: Strong problem-solving abilities and a proactive mindset. Effective communication skills, capable of articulating technical concepts to non-technical stakeholders. A strong sense of ownership and a drive for continuous improvement. Education: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field.
additional_information: Certifications (optional but preferred): Certified Kubernetes Administrator (CKA) AWS Certified Solutions Architect Node.js Certification
skills_tags: SQL database development, Node.js, Nest.js

description: Tedly builds AI-powered tools that automate property management and home improvement. We’re looking for a Front-End Developer to build clean, responsive interfaces and help shape the user experience of our growing platform. You’ll work on real production systems used by landlords, property managers, and homeowners across North America, turning complex workflows into intuitive and reliable user interfaces.
responsibilities: What You’ll Do Build modern web interfaces using Next JS, TypeScript, and Tailwind . Implement pixel-perfect designs, reusable components, and responsive layouts across the platform. Develop and maintain a scalable design system and component library . Collaborate closely with product managers and designers (Figma) to translate product ideas into high-quality UI. Integrate front-end applications with backend APIs and services. Ensure UI performance, accessibility, and responsiveness across devices. Use AI-powered development tools and apply Vibe Coding principles to accelerate development and experimentation. Contribute to building modern AI-driven interfaces , including experiences related to AI assistants and agent-based workflows. Participate in code reviews and help improve front-end quality and consistency across the product.
required_qualifications: What We’re Looking For 3+ years of experience in front-end or full-stack development. Strong experience with React/Next, TypeScript, and modern JavaScript frameworks. Experience building responsive interfaces and reusable UI components. Strong understanding of HTML, CSS, and modern styling frameworks (Tailwind or similar). Ability to translate Figma designs into pixel-perfect interfaces. Experience integrating front-end applications with REST APIs . Comfortable working in a fast-moving product environment with iterative development. Interest in AI-assisted development workflows and modern development tooling. Experience with AI development tools (such as Antigravity or similar) or familiarity with AI agents and conversational UI patterns . Experience with front-end testing frameworks .
additional_information: Why Tedly? Impactful work - your code powers real property operations every day. AI-first environment - build with modern tools and responsible AI workflows. Growth path - opportunity to grow toward senior engineering roles as the team expands. Strong team culture - onsite collaboration, ownership mindset, and fast iteration. How to Apply Send your CV and a short introduction to: 📧 hr@tedly.com

description: Role Overview: We are looking for an experienced Java Engineer to join client's backend team, which is working on the back-office platform of a high-load B2B gaming system. Their platform processes millions of transactions daily and supports real-time operations for multiple partners. As the system continues to grow, the engineering team is expanding to improve scalability, performance, and reliability, while gradually evolving parts of the platform from a monolithic architecture toward distributed services. You will work on both new functionality and architectural improvements, helping modernise critical parts of the platform. Technology Stack: Java 8 / Java 17, Spring Framework, MSSQL 2019, Kafka, Redis, distributed services with parts of the system still evolving from a monolithic architecture.
responsibilities: Key Responsibilities: Develop new backend functionality for the platform; Improve system performance, scalability, and reliability; Participate in refactoring and modernisation of legacy components; Contribute to architectural discussions and technical design; Investigate and resolve production issues; Assess technical feasibility and complexity of business requirements; Collaborate closely with backend engineers, technical leads, and product teams
required_qualifications: Ideal profile for the position: 5+ years of Java development experience; Strong understanding of backend architecture and distributed systems; Experience working with relational databases and SQL; Familiarity with message-driven systems (Kafka or similar); Experience in improving or refactoring existing production systems; Strong problem-solving and debugging skills; Comfortable working in collaborative environments with code reviews and shared ownership of the codebase; English level: Intermediate or higher.
additional_information: The company guarantees you the following benefits: Global Collaboration: Join an international team where everyone treats each other with respect and moves towards the same goal; Autonomy and Responsibility: Enjoy the freedom and responsibility to make decisions without the need for constant supervision. Competitive Compensation: Receive competitive salaries reflective of your expertise and knowledge as our partner seeks top performers. Remote Work Opportunities: Embrace the flexibility of fully remote work, with the option to visit company offices that align with your current location. Flexible Work Schedule: Focus on performance, not hours, with a flexible work schedule that promotes a results-oriented approach; Paid Time Off: Prioritise work-life balance with paid vacation and sick leave days to prevent burnout; Career Development: Access continuous learning and career development opportunities to enhance your professional growth; Corporate Culture: Experience a vibrant corporate atmosphere with exciting parties and team-building events throughout the year; Referral Bonuses: Refer talented friends and receive a bonus after they successfully complete their probation period; Medical Insurance Support: Choose the right private medical insurance and receive compensation (full or partial) based on the cost; Flexible Benefits: Customise your compensation by selecting activities or expenses you'd like the company to cover, such as a gym subscription, language courses, Netflix subscription, spa days, and more; Education Foundation: Participate in a biannual raffle for a chance to learn something new unrelated to your job as part of your commitment to ongoing education. Interview process: HR Interview with the Recruiter; Technical interview with the team; A 1.5-hour Final interview with the team. If you find this opportunity right for you, don't hesitate to apply or get in touch with us if you have any questions!

description: As a Backend Software Developer, you will be responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining backend services and APIs. You will collaborate with cross-functional teams to build robust and efficient backend systems that integrate seamlessly with front-end applications and cloud-based services. The ideal candidate will have a minimum of 3+ years of experience in backend development and a strong technical background in .NET Core, API development, and cloud services.
responsibilities: Design, develop, and maintain backend services and APIs. Optimize database performance and design efficient data models. Implement authentication, authorization, and security best practices. Develop and maintain asynchronous processing and messaging systems. Work closely with front-end and DevOps teams to integrate backend functionalities. Debug, troubleshoot, and improve system performance and reliability.SPOLITH SDN. BHD. Design and implement seamless integration between backend services and cloud-based services (e.g., AWS S3 for storage, AWS Lambda for processing). Establish and maintain robust API contracts with the front-end team to ensure smooth data exchange and feature delivery. Configure and monitor integration points with external third-party APIs and services. Collaborate with DevOps to integrate backend services into CI/CD pipelines for automated deployment and testing. Implement and integrate distributed tracing and logging solutions to monitor cross-service communication in event-driven and distributed architectures.
required_qualifications: 3+ years of experience in back-end development. Strong expertise in .NET Core / ASP.NET Core for building web APIs and backend services. Proficiency in C# with a focus on clean, efficient, and scalable code. Experience with relational databases such as PostgreSQL or SQL Server (writing complex queries, optimizing performance, designing schemas). Strong understanding of RESTful API design and development. Implementation of authentication and authorization using OAuth2, JWT, and AWS Cognito. Experience with asynchronous processing and messaging systems (e.g., Kafka, RabbitMQ, AWS SNS/SQS). Background in building distributed systems and event-driven architectures.
additional_information: Preferred Skills Familiarity with NoSQL databases (e.g., DynamoDB, MongoDB). Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines and testing frameworks. Hands-on experience with AWS services, particularly: AWS Lambda (serverless functions). AWS Cognito (authentication and user management). AWS S3, API Gateway, and DynamoDB Work Style Agile and SCRUM methodologies for collaborative and efficient project delivery. Excellent communication and teamwork skills.
skills_tags: C#
